tags.norm:macro-csr: The csr:mstatus[] register controls the csr::[sum] field.
tags.norm:macro-csr-field: Bits csr:mip[meip] and csr:mie[meie] are interrupt bits.
tags.norm:macro-instruction: When csr::[tw]=0, the insn:wfi[] instruction may execute.
tags.norm:macro-extension: If the ext:sscofpmf[] extension is implemented, csr::[lcofip] is writable.
tags.norm:macro-range: Registers f0-f31 and bits 31{endash}1 are reserved.
tags.norm:macro-alt-csr-field: When csr:[tm] is clear, access is denied.
